title: Fourier Transform Voice Analysis Diagram
brief: A beautiful technical illustration showing Fourier Transform applied to voice analysis. Split into two panels: left panel shows a complex voice waveform in time domain (wavy oscillating lines), with an arrow pointing to right panel. Right panel shows the same signal decomposed into frequency components - clean sine waves stacked vertically at different frequencies (100Hz, 200Hz, 400Hz, 800Hz, 1600Hz), each with amplitude bars. Mathematical formula 'X(f) = ∫x(t)e^(-j2πft)dt' elegantly displayed at top. Dark background with glowing cyan and magenta waves. Title: 'FIGURE 5: 傅里叶变换声纹分解 (Fourier Transform Voice Decomposition)'. Scientific, elegant, slightly cyberpunk aesthetic. Chinese and English labels.
